name: gemini
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>verify>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,safety-gates,deterministic-output |
 lens: feynman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: GEMINI_GOAL
required_inputs.description: Exact analysis or verification goal for Gemini.

required_inputs.name: SESSION_ID
required_inputs.description: Explicit Gemini session id for resume mode.
